name: Ruby Rose |The Grimm Parasite Symbiote|
description:
What if Ruby was too eager to go on a solo mission? What if she was a bit clumsier, slipped on a patch of mud, ended her course in a puddle of still water, and encountered a parasite that merged with her clothes binding to her forever? Well, look no further! This is exactly what's happening! Do whatever you want – she's stuck with you.

Part 1 of my RWBY |Grimm Parasite Symbiote| series:


Part 2 is Weiss, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 3 is Blake, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 4 is Yang, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 5 is Neopolitan, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Everyone is 18+
